footerDescription: All-in-One Cloud SaaS for preschool management — admissions, students, classes, fees, parents, and reports on a single platform.
heroSubtitle: Kinder CRM helps preschools digitize their entire workflow — from admissions and student management to classes, staff, fees, and parent communication — on a single Cloud SaaS system.
heroVisionText: Kinder CRM is more than preschool management software — it is a comprehensive digital transformation platform for early childhood education, helping schools manage centrally, operate efficiently, and grow sustainably on one unified system.
heroFeatureSubheading: Flexible modular architecture that scales with your needs — with {{productName}}.
heroFeatureCrmDesc: Manage leads, track the admissions pipeline, and convert prospects into enrolled students.
heroFeatureStudentsDesc: Centralized student profiles, history tracking, and linked parent information.
heroFeatureClassesDesc: Organize classes, assign students and homeroom teachers across campuses.
heroFeatureStaffDesc: Manage staff, assign duties, and apply detailed role-based permissions.
heroFeatureAttendanceDesc: Daily attendance, leave tracking, and automatic parent notifications.
heroFeatureFeesDesc: Fee schedules, debt tracking, and transparent financial reports.
heroExtendedModulesSubtitle: Additional modules for complete operations and stronger parent engagement.
heroFeatureMenuDesc: Weekly menus, nutrition management, and sharing with parents.
heroFeatureDiaryDesc: Daily activities, progress notes, and teacher comments for each child.
heroFeatureParentsDesc: Notifications, messages, and real-time updates on your child's day.
heroFeatureCmsDesc: Build your school website, publish news, and accept online admissions.
heroFeatureReportsDesc: Visual dashboards for admissions, attendance, fees, and operations.
heroValuesSubtitle: Kinder CRM helps schools run smarter — not just manage isolated tasks.
heroValueCentralized: Centralized management on one platform — students, classes, staff, and finances in sync.
heroValueAutomation: Automated school workflows — from attendance and fee collection to parent notifications.
heroValueEfficiency: Save time and reduce errors — replace manual records with a digital system.
heroValueExperience: Better experience for teachers, parents, and leadership — transparent, timely, professional.
heroValueScale: Easy to scale as you add campuses — multi-branch support with granular permissions.
heroHowItWorksSubtitle: Fast Cloud deployment — no installation, no dedicated servers.
heroStep1Title: Sign up & set up your school
heroStep1Desc: Create an account, configure your school and campus — ready in minutes.
heroStep2Desc: Add students, classes, staff, and fee plans — import Excel or enter manually.
heroStep3Desc: Take attendance, collect fees, send diaries and parent updates — all in one place.
heroPreviewRecentItem2: Parent Nguyen V.A. — April tuition paid
heroBottomCtaSubtitle: Sign up for free and experience Kinder CRM — One Platform. Every School.

cookiePolicyPage.intro: {{product}} ({{siteUrl}}) uses cookies and similar browser storage to operate the preschool management platform, maintain login sessions, remember interface preferences, and protect account security.
cookiePolicyPage.section1Body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function reliably and improve your experience.
cookiePolicyPage.categoryEssential: Essential cookies — required for sign-in, security, and core Kinder CRM features.
cookiePolicyPage.categoryFunctional: Functional cookies — remember language, light/dark theme, and layout preferences.
cookiePolicyPage.section2Body: Below is a list of cookies set directly by Kinder CRM when you use the platform:

csrf.name: csrfSecret
csrf.purpose: Protect against CSRF attacks on mutating requests

theme.name: theme
theme.purpose: Remember light, dark, or system theme mode

layout.name: layout-style
layout.purpose: Remember sidebar layout preference in the admin area

cookiePolicyPage.section3Body: Some features may set cookies through third-party providers when you actively use that service:
cookiePolicyPage.thirdPartyStripe: Stripe — when paying for a subscription via Stripe Checkout, Stripe may set cookies for payment processing and fraud prevention.
cookiePolicyPage.section4Body: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note:
cookiePolicyPage.manageBrowser: Each browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, etc.) has its own cookie and site data settings.
cookiePolicyPage.manageEssential: Disabling essential cookies may prevent sign-in or use of platform features.
cookiePolicyPage.section5Body: Information collected via cookies may relate to personal data. See our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> for more details.
cookiePolicyPage.section6Body: We may update this cookie policy when adding features or changing technology. The new version will be posted on this page with the update date.
cookiePolicyPage.section7Body: If you have questions about {{product}}'s cookie policy, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

privacyPolicyPage.intro: This privacy policy describes how {{product}} ({{siteUrl}}) collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data when you use the preschool management platform.
privacyPolicyPage.section1Body: This policy applies to users who register for and use {{product}}, including:
privacyPolicyPage.audienceOwners: School leadership and admins managing campuses
privacyPolicyPage.audienceTeachers: Teachers and staff running classes, attendance, and learning diaries
privacyPolicyPage.audienceStudents: Parents accessing their children's information and communicating with the school
privacyPolicyPage.section2Body: Depending on your role and how you use the platform, we may process the following types of data:

account.purpose: Registration, sign-in, authentication, and session security

profile.purpose: Display user information within the system

organization.examples: School name, logo, address, member roles, invitations

students.examples: Full name, date of birth, parent info, basic health records
students.purpose: Manage student profiles and class operations

classes.examples: Class name, student roster, homeroom teacher

fees.examples: Fee items, outstanding balance, payment receipts

parents.examples: Name, contact details, messages and responses

logs.examples: Audit logs, sign-in events, important actions

billing.examples: Subscription plan, bank transfer receipts, Stripe payment data

privacyPolicyPage.section3Body: Data is used for the following purposes:
privacyPolicyPage.useService: Provide and operate preschool management modules (students, classes, attendance, fees, parents)
privacyPolicyPage.useGrade: Generate reports, dashboards, and support operational decisions
privacyPolicyPage.useSecurity: Protect accounts, prevent unauthorized access, and enforce security policies
privacyPolicyPage.useBilling: Manage SaaS subscription plans, quotas, and payments
privacyPolicyPage.useSupport: Support users and improve service quality
privacyPolicyPage.section4Body: We may share data with service providers necessary to operate the platform:
privacyPolicyPage.shareSupabase: Supabase — authentication (Auth), PostgreSQL database, and file storage
privacyPolicyPage.shareStripe: Stripe — card payment processing when you choose Stripe Checkout
privacyPolicyPage.shareHosting: Hosting provider (e.g. Vercel) — serving the web application
privacyPolicyPage.shareNoSell: We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacyPolicyPage.section5Body: Data is retained for as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal obligations:
privacyPolicyPage.retentionAccount: Account data — until you request deletion or close your account (unless law requires longer retention)
privacyPolicyPage.retentionExam: Operational data (attendance, fees, diaries) — according to the policy of the school that owns the data
privacyPolicyPage.retentionLogs: Technical logs — for a reasonable period for security and operations
privacyPolicyPage.section6Body: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures, including:
privacyPolicyPage.securityAuth: Authentication via Supabase Auth and password hashing
privacyPolicyPage.securityRls: Row Level Security (RLS) on the database — each school/campus accesses only its own data
privacyPolicyPage.securityAccess: Role-based access control (Owner, Admin, Teacher, Staff, Parent)
privacyPolicyPage.section7Body: Depending on applicable law, you may have the following rights:
privacyPolicyPage.rightAccess: Request access to personal data we hold about you
privacyPolicyPage.rightDelete: Request account or data deletion (where supported in the app)
privacyPolicyPage.rightWithdraw: Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
privacyPolicyPage.rightContact: To exercise these rights, contact us through the platform's support channels. Parents may need to contact school leadership or admins.
privacyPolicyPage.section8Body: Preschool student information is typically entered by the school. Schools are responsible for having a lawful basis to process children's data and notifying parents/guardians when required.
privacyPolicyPage.section9Body: We use cookies and similar browser technologies. See our <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink> for details.
privacyPolicyPage.section10Body: We may update this privacy policy when features change or legal requirements evolve. The new version will be posted on this page with the update date.
privacyPolicyPage.section11Body: If you have questions about {{product}}'s privacy policy, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

termsOfServicePage.intro: These Terms of Service («Terms») govern your access to and use of {{product}} at {{siteUrl}}. By registering an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms.
termsOfServicePage.section1Body: {{product}} is an All-in-One Cloud SaaS preschool management platform providing (depending on your plan) features including:
termsOfServicePage.serviceStudents: Student profiles and linked parent information
termsOfServicePage.serviceClasses: Class management, teacher assignment, and multi-campus support
termsOfServicePage.serviceFees: Tuition, debt management, and financial reports
termsOfServicePage.serviceParents: Parent communication, learning diaries, and notifications
termsOfServicePage.section2Body: When creating an account, you agree to:
termsOfServicePage.accountAccurate: Provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information
termsOfServicePage.accountSecure: Keep login credentials secure and accept responsibility for activity under your account
termsOfServicePage.accountNotify: Notify us promptly if you detect unauthorized access
termsOfServicePage.section3Body: Each user may belong to one or more schools/campuses with roles such as:
termsOfServicePage.roleOwner: Owner — owns and manages the school, including billing and members
termsOfServicePage.roleAdmin: Admin — operational administration within assigned permissions
termsOfServicePage.roleTeacher: Teacher — manages classes, attendance, diaries, and students
termsOfServicePage.roleStudent: Parent/Staff — accesses information according to assigned role
termsOfServicePage.orgResponsibility: Owners and Admins are responsible for member conduct and Terms compliance when inviting members or processing student data.
termsOfServicePage.useNoCheat: Tamper with the system, access another school's data without authorization, or misuse children's data
termsOfServicePage.useNoAbuse: Attack, reverse engineer, spam, or overload infrastructure
termsOfServicePage.useContent: Upload content that infringes copyright, is offensive, or harmful
termsOfServicePage.section5Body: Some features and quotas (students, campuses) depend on your subscription plan:
termsOfServicePage.billingPlans: Free, Pro, and/or Enterprise — details shown in the school's billing area
termsOfServicePage.billingQuota: When quota is exceeded, some create actions may be limited until you upgrade
termsOfServicePage.billingStripe: Stripe payments are subject to Stripe's terms
termsOfServicePage.billingTransfer: Bank transfer payments (if available) must be verified per our internal process
termsOfServicePage.billingChanges: We may adjust pricing or plan features; material changes will be communicated reasonably before taking effect.
termsOfServicePage.section6Body: Content ownership is allocated as follows:
termsOfServicePage.ipOrg: Schools retain rights to student data, classes, diaries, and content they create or import
termsOfServicePage.ipPlatform: {{product}} and platform components (software, UI, branding) remain our or our licensors' property
termsOfServicePage.section7Body: Schools are responsible for having a lawful basis to collect and process preschool student data on the platform, including notifying parents when required by law. See the Privacy Policy for data processing details.
termsOfServicePage.section8Body: To the extent permitted by law:
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerUptime: The service may be interrupted for maintenance, upgrades, or events beyond reasonable control
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerAccuracy: Reports and dashboards depend on data entered by the school; leadership should review before making official decisions
termsOfServicePage.disclaimerAsIs: The service is provided «as is» without implied warranties of fitness for a particular purpose
termsOfServicePage.section9Body: To the extent permitted by law, {{product}} and its providers are not liable for indirect damages, data loss caused by user error, or damages exceeding fees paid for the service in the prior 12 months (if any).
termsOfServicePage.section10Body: These Terms remain in effect until terminated:
termsOfServicePage.terminationUser: You may stop using the service and request account deletion (where supported)
termsOfServicePage.terminationPlatform: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms or as required by law
termsOfServicePage.section11Body: These Terms are supplemented by our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <cookieLink>Cookie Policy</cookieLink>.
termsOfServicePage.section12Body: We may update these Terms when features or legal requirements change. Continued use after an update means you accept the new version.
termsOfServicePage.section13Body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Vietnam, unless mandatory law provides otherwise. Disputes will first be resolved through negotiation; failing that, competent courts in Vietnam shall have jurisdiction.
termsOfServicePage.section14Body: For questions about {{product}}'s Terms of Service, visit {{siteUrl}} or contact us through the platform's official support channels.

pricingPage.paymentNoteContact: Contact the Kinder CRM team for plan recommendations and onboarding support for your school.
pricingPage.orgNote: Plans apply per school/campus. One account can manage multiple campuses — each manages its own plan. See <faqLink>FAQ</faqLink> for more.

free.description: Try the platform and start with a small preschool.

pro.description: For growing preschools with multiple classes.

enterprise.description: Multi-branch school systems with high quotas.

faqPage.ctaHint: Didn't find your answer? Sign up for free or view pricing to get started with Kinder CRM.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.a1: Kinder CRM is an All-in-One Cloud SaaS preschool management platform. Schools can digitize admissions, student management, classes, staff, fees, attendance, and parent communication on a single system.
gettingStarted.a2: Yes. The Free plan lets you start with a set student quota — ideal for trying the platform or small schools. See the Pricing page for details.
gettingStarted.a3: Sign up — the system automatically creates a school/campus for you. Then add students, classes, staff, and start operating. No software installation or dedicated servers required.
gettingStarted.a4: Yes. Kinder CRM supports multi-campus, multi-user operations with granular permissions — from small private preschools to multi-branch systems. Each campus manages its own subscription plan.

modules.title: Modules & features
modules.a1: Core modules include: admissions CRM, student management, classes, teachers & staff, attendance, fees & debt, meals & nutrition, learning diary, parent connection, Website CMS, and reports & dashboard. AI Assistant is on the roadmap.
modules.q2: Can I import students in bulk?
modules.a2: Yes. Import an Excel file with student and parent information to add many children at once (within your plan's quota).
modules.a3: Teachers take daily attendance by class — present, absent, excused leave. The system records it and can automatically notify parents when a child is absent.
modules.a4: School leadership sets fee schedules by period, tracks each student's balance, and views consolidated financial reports on the dashboard.

parents.title: Parents & connection
parents.q1: How do parents use Kinder CRM?
parents.a1: Parents sign in through accounts linked to their children. They view attendance, learning diaries, menus, teacher announcements, and fee status — all in one app.
parents.q2: Can schools send notifications to parents?
parents.a2: Yes. Teachers and leadership send announcements, messages, and daily activity updates. Parents receive timely information about their child's day.
parents.a3: The Website CMS module helps schools build an introduction website, publish news, and accept online admissions — directly linked to the admissions CRM.

billing.title: Plans & billing
billing.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
billing.a1: Prices are shown in VND. Contact the Kinder CRM team for plan recommendations and payment support.
billing.q2: How do I upgrade my plan?
billing.a2: Sign up for an account and contact our support team for Pro or Enterprise plan recommendations based on your school's size.
billing.a3: Each plan limits the maximum number of students per school/campus. When you're near the limit (≥80%), the dashboard shows a warning. Upgrade your plan to increase quota and unlock more modules.
